images.description:
Create a page called `calendar.html` similar to Google Calendar UI.

Requirements:

1. Layout
- Same header and footer as other pages.
- Main section contains:
  - Top toolbar
  - Calendar grid

2. Toolbar
- Buttons:
  - Previous Month
  - Next Month
- Display:
  - Current Month + Year
